title: Simply Crafted
description: A collection of vanilla+ mods to enhance your Minecraft experience.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa6e1c64c07a4044cd36696114c92c017443d285.jpeg)

## Description
Simply Crafted is a Vanilla+ modpack that keeps Minecraft feeling familiar, just better.
It adds small quality-of-life tweaks, minor visual improvements, and a few handy tools - all without changing the core gameplay.

No big game-changing features. No confusing things to learn. Just Minecraft, a bit more polished.

Perfect for casual play, long-term survival, and chill exploration.

## Key Features
🔹Improved performance
🔹Useful QOL features
🔹Fresh sound effects
🔹Subtle particle effects
🔹Mob Animations
🔹Stunning visuals
🔹Immersive weather
🔹World map
🔹& much more!

## Support
Find a bug or run into an issue? Open a ticket on [Discord](https://discord.gg/wcJdTgCKCf) and we'll try to help.
